**Benzene frontier orbitals** — DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) using PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. No density-fitting flag was used. SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings array was returned by the tool.

- LUMO = -0.41574728 eV
